'''âp-t-r''' ('''kapatar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulverize|pulverize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulverize|pulverize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kapatar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipatar|thipatar]] || [[word:jipatar|jipatar]] || [[word:shipatar|shipatar]] || [[word:kipatar|kipatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupatar|thuthupatar]] || [[word:jujupatar|jujupatar]] || [[word:shushupatar|shushupatar]] || [[word:kukupatar|kukupatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupatar|thupatar]] || [[word:jupatar|jupatar]] || [[word:shupatar|shupatar]] || [[word:kupatar|kupatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupatar|thupatar]] || [[word:jupatar|jupatar]] || [[word:shupatar|shupatar]] || [[word:kupatar|kupatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepatar|thepatar]] || [[word:jepatar|jepatar]] || [[word:shepatar|shepatar]] || [[word:kepatar|kepatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopatar|thothopatar]] || [[word:jojopatar|jojopatar]] || [[word:shoshopatar|shoshopatar]] || [[word:kokopatar|kokopatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopatar|thopatar]] || [[word:jopatar|jopatar]] || [[word:shopatar|shopatar]] || [[word:kopatar|kopatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopatar|thopatar]] || [[word:jopatar|jopatar]] || [[word:shopatar|shopatar]] || [[word:kopatar|kopatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpatar|thĂŠpatar]] || [[word:jĂŠpatar|jĂŠpatar]] || [[word:shĂŠpatar|shĂŠpatar]] || [[word:kĂŠpatar|kĂŠpatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapatar|thathapatar]] || [[word:jajapatar|jajapatar]] || [[word:shashapatar|shashapatar]] || [[word:kakapatar|kakapatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapatar|thapatar]] || [[word:japatar|japatar]] || [[word:shapatar|shapatar]] || [[word:kapatar|kapatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapatar|thapatar]] || [[word:japatar|japatar]] || [[word:shapatar|shapatar]] || [[word:kapatar|kapatar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapatar|shapatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapatar|goshapatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapatar|gokishapatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapatarnĂŒ|shapatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapatarnknĂŒ|goshapatarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatarnĂŒ|gokishapatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapatarshĂ«|shapatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapatarnkshĂ«|goshapatarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapatarshĂ«|gokishapatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapataro|shapataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatarnkro|goshapatarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapataro|gokishapataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatarmu|shapatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatarnkmu|goshapatarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatarmu|gokishapatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapatarsher|shapatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapatarnksher|goshapatarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapatarsher|gokishapatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapatarng|shapatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapatarnkng|goshapatarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapatarng|gokishapatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapatarya|shapatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapatarnkya|goshapatarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapatarya|gokishapatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapataryam|shapataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapatarnkyam|goshapatarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapataryam|gokishapataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapatarnĂŒshĂ«|shapatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapatarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapatarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatarnĂŒro|shapatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatarnknĂŒro|goshapatarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatarnĂŒro|gokishapatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatarnĂŒmu|shapatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatarnknĂŒmu|goshapatarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatarnĂŒmu|gokishapatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapatarshĂ«nĂŒ|shapatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatarshĂ«ro|shapatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatarnkshĂ«ro|goshapatarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatarshĂ«ro|gokishapatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatarshĂ«mu|shapatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatarnkshĂ«mu|goshapatarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatarshĂ«mu|gokishapatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapataronĂŒ|shapataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatarnkronĂŒ|goshapatarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapataronĂŒ|gokishapataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapataroshĂ«|shapataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatarnkroshĂ«|goshapatarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapataroshĂ«|gokishapataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapataromu|shapataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatarnkromu|goshapatarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapataromu|gokishapataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapatarmunĂŒ|shapatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatarnkmunĂŒ|goshapatarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatarmunĂŒ|gokishapatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapatarmushĂ«|shapatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatarnkmushĂ«|goshapatarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapatarmushĂ«|gokishapatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatarmuro|shapatarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatarnkmuro|goshapatarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatarmuro|gokishapatarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|2edd495}}
